_comment: Hook definitions for Claude Code. Each key is a hook event type. Each event contains an array of hook objects with matcher and command fields.
_hook_fields: matcher (regex matching tool name), command (shell command to run), timeout_ms (optional, default 60000)

Stop._comment: Run lint and typecheck after Claude finishes a session to catch any introduced issues.
Stop.command: source "$HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh" 2>/dev/null; pnpm run --if-present lint; pnpm run --if-present typecheck

PostToolUse._comment: After writing/editing Vue, TS, or SCSS files, run lint on the changed file.
